All Sessions

Training That Moves You Forward

Every session is intentional — designed to push you beyond theory and into real, applicable skill.

🚀 Cohort Launch
First Cohort Class Begins — Graphico x Marketonomy
The official kickoff of the first cohort class. Students joined from across the country for the beginning of a structured, mentor-led graphics design journey.
📅 October 13, 2024 💻 Online 🎨 Graphics Design
🎓 Live Session
Digital Branding & Identity — Google Meet
An interactive session covering brand personality, visual identity systems, and how to craft a brand that speaks without words. Led by Emmanuel Modupe.
📅 November 2024 💻 Google Meet 🎨 Graphics Design
🖥 Workshop
Advanced Photoshop — PSF Design & Coordination
Hands-on Photoshop training covering layer management, smart objects, and real-world flyer design. Students worked on live projects during the session.
📅 November 24, 2024 💻 Google Meet 🎨 Graphics Design
🎓 Live Session
Adobe Illustrator — Getting Started with Vector Design
Tolulope Salisu led students through Illustrator fundamentals, teaching artboard setup, shape tools, and how to approach vector-based design professionally.
📅 October 17, 2024 💻 Google Meet 🎨 Graphics Design
📍 Physical
Live Training Environment — Breaking New Grounds
A physical training session held in a structured environment. Students engaged with speakers, discussed skill pathways, and networked in an in-person setting.
📅 2024 📍 In-Person 🌍 Open Track
Testimonials

What Our Students Are Saying

Real words from real people whose perspective on skill, design, and purpose has been transformed.

"
★★★★★

The Advanced Graphic Class was a pivotal shift in my career. I've always believed that design should be more than just aesthetic decoration — it should be a functional system. By integrating the five traits: Values, Voice, Taste, Posture, and Habits, I've shifted my process from 'making things look good' to building brand identities with actual character. I now understand that a logo is just a face, and without a defined personality, it's nothing more than a mask.

Ebube
Graphics Design Student
Advanced Graphics · Cohort 1
"
★★★★★

Registering for the Advanced Graphic Design Class has been a truly eye-opening experience. Before now, I saw design mostly from a surface level, focused on aesthetics and visual appeal. But these classes have completely shifted my perspective and helped me understand the "why" behind every design decision. From Design Thinking to Color Psychology, Branding, and Typography — each session helped me understand the backend of design. I'm truly grateful to Marketonomy and Graphico for how much I've learned.

Rebecca
Graphics Design Student
Advanced Graphics · Cohort 1
